title: conversion of string values to an interval second column is implemented incorrect and incomplete
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE INTERVAL_TBL_2 (f1 INT, f2 VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO INTERVAL_TBL_2 (f1, f2) VALUES (SEC_TO_TIME(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, '1970-01-01 00:00:00', '1970-01-03 03:00:00')), 'valid interval');
INSERT INTO INTERVAL_TBL_2 (f1, f2) VALUES (SEC_TO_TIME(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, '1970-01-01 00:00:00', '1971-01-01 00:00:00')), 'another valid interval');
INSERT INTO INTERVAL_TBL_2 (f1, f2) VALUES (NULL, 'invalid interval');
SELECT f1, f2 FROM INTERVAL_TBL_2 WHERE f1 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect conversion of string values to interval second
